import json

# Load the lists
with open(locals()['var_function-call-8397547898646766086'], 'r') as f:
    stock_info = json.load(f)
    
with open(locals()['var_function-call-15189621055493639909'], 'r') as f:
    trade_tables = json.load(f)

# Create a set of trade tables for fast lookup
trade_tables_set = set(trade_tables)

# Filter stock_info
valid_stocks = []
for stock in stock_info:
    sym = stock['Symbol']
    if sym in trade_tables_set:
        valid_stocks.append(stock)

print(f"Total valid stocks: {len(valid_stocks)}")
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(valid_stocks))

args.code:
import json

# Load symbols
with open(locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083'], 'r') as f:
    symbols = json.load(f)

batch = symbols[0:50]

queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = f"SELECT '{sym}' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM \"{sym}\" WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[20:70]
template = "SELECT 'SYM' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM SYM WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[60:100]
# Use single quotes for python string, double quotes for table name
template = 'SELECT \'SYM\' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM "SYM" WHERE Date >= \'2017-01-01\' AND Date <= \'2017-12-31\''
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

val_args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[60:100]
# Use single quotes for python string, double quotes for table name
template = 'SELECT \'SYM\' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM "SYM" WHERE Date >= \'2017-01-01\' AND Date <= \'2017-12-31\''
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[60:80]
# Unquoted table names
template = "SELECT 'SYM' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM SYM WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[60:80]
# Unquoted table names
template = "SELECT 'SYM' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM SYM WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:100]
dq = chr(34)
template = "SELECT 'SYM' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + "SYM" + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:100]
dq = chr(34)
template = "SELECT 'SYM' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + "SYM" + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:90]
template = "SELECT 'SYM' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM SYM WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:90]
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    table = sym
    if sym == 'H':
        table = '"H"'
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + table + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:90]
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    table = sym
    if sym == 'H':
        table = '"H"'
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + table + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:90]
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']
template = "SELECT 'SYM' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM SYM WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
queries = [template.replace("SYM", sym) for sym in batch]
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:90]
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    # use backslash quote for table
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM \"" + sym + "\" WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

val_args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:90]
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    # use backslash quote for table
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM \"" + sym + "\" WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:90]
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:90]
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:130]
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:130]
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json

symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:]
# Remove H if present to avoid duplication/issues (though duplication is fine)
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']

dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
l = len(full_query)
print(f"Length: {l}")

chunk_size = 8000
for i in range(0, l, chunk_size):
    print(f"__CHUNK_{i}__:")
    print(full_query[i:i+chunk_size])
    print(f"__END_CHUNK_{i}__")

# Just print a valid JSON at the end to satisfy the tool
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps("Done"))

import json

symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:]
# Remove H if present to avoid duplication/issues (though duplication is fine)
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']

dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
l = len(full_query)
print(f"Length: {l}")

chunk_size = 8000
for i in range(0, l, chunk_size):
    print(f"__CHUNK_{i}__:")
    print(full_query[i:i+chunk_size])
    print(f"__END_CHUNK_{i}__")

# Just print a valid JSON at the end to satisfy the tool
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps("Done"))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:120]
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[80:120]
batch = [s for s in batch if s != 'H']
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[120:160]
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[160:200]
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[160:200]
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

args.code:
import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[200:]
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))

import json
symbols = locals()['var_function-call-12098710759054107083']
batch = symbols[200:]
dq = chr(34)
queries = []
for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT '" + sym + "' as Symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays FROM " + dq + sym + dq + " WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'"
    queries.append(q)
full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full_query))
